nasb.text: As soon as the order spread, the sons of Israel provided in abundance the first fruits of grain, new wine, oil, honey and of all the produce of the field; and they brought in abundantly the tithe of all.

esv.text: As soon as the command was spread abroad, the people of Israel gave in abundance the firstfruits of grain, wine, oil, honey, and of all the produce of the field. And they brought in abundantly the tithe of everything.

cnv.text: 這命令一發出，以色列人就送來很多初熟的五穀、新酒、油和蜜，以及田間各樣的出產，又把各物品的十分之一，大批送來。

ccb.text: 谕旨一出，以色列人就献出许多初熟的五谷、新酒、新油、蜂蜜、田间的出产及各样物品的十分之一，数量极多。
